import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react'; import { Camera, Crosshair, X } from 'lucide-react'; const WATER_LEVELS = [ { key: 'Low', label: 'Low', color: 'bg-emerald-400/15 ring-emerald-400/25 text-emerald-100' }, { key: 'Medium', label: 'Medium', color: 'bg-yellow-400/15 ring-yellow-400/25 text-yellow-100' }, { key: 'High', label: 'High', color: 'bg-red-500/15 ring-red-500/25 text-red-200' }, ]; export default function ReportModal({ open, onClose, onSubmit, location, locationQuery, onLocationQueryChange, onSetLocationFromText, locationHint, onDetectLocation, submitting, }) { const [waterLevel, setWaterLevel] = useState('Low'); const [file, setFile] = useState(null); const canSubmit = useMemo(() => { return open && location?.lat != null && location?.lng != null && !submitting; }, [location, open, submitting]); if (!open) return null; return (
Submit Flood Report
Your report helps others choose safer routes.
Location
{onSetLocationFromText ? (
onLocationQueryChange?.(e.target.value)} placeholder='Type a place or "lat,lng"' className="w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-500 outline-none focus:border-sky-500/60" /> {locationHint ?
{locationHint}
: null}
) : null}
Lat {location?.lat ?? 'â€”'}
Lng {location?.lng ?? 'â€”'}
Tip: you can also click the map to set the report location.
Water Level
{WATER_LEVELS.map((opt) => ( ))}

); }
